'''âng-sh-sh-k''' ('''kangashshekoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zirconiate|zirconiate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-sh-sh-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zirconiate|zirconiate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âng-sh-sh-k
|-
! Lemma
| kangashshekoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingashekoko|thingashekoko]] || [[word:jingashekoko|jingashekoko]] || [[word:shingashekoko|shingashekoko]] || [[word:kingashekoko|kingashekoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongashekoko|thongashekoko]] || [[word:jongashekoko|jongashekoko]] || [[word:shongashekoko|shongashekoko]] || [[word:kongashekoko|kongashekoko]]
|-

|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
